reviews.review_title: Gonna turn out to be an awesome game
reviews.review_description: W game so far I just saw it release so I downloaded it but one question dev, why is bloody on fire and why is the pipe spraying out fire lol. Anyways I love the game movement is really good too I can move really fast. Good job on the game!

developer_response.body: Wow dude thanks so much for the five stars! Idk why Dreadwood is on fire I just thought it would be cool same with the pipe. It'll be gone next update. Thanks man I worked hard on trying to have a good movement. Next update is going to be massive!
